question: A bank wants to hand over to an external service provider the decision on whether to enter into or terminate client relationships. Is this permissible under the outsourcing rules?
A bank in supervisory category 4 would like to transfer its operational compliance tasks to an external provider. Is this admissible?
Is the outsourcing of a significant function by an insurance company subject to FINMA authorisation because of its relevance to the business plan?

A Swiss bank plans to move its securities settlement to a service provider located abroad and can expressly guarantee that it, its audit firm and FINMA are able to enforce their inspection and audit rights there. Is the outsourcing abroad admissible?

A bank outsources its IT operations to a shared-services company within its own group and can demonstrate that the risks typically associated with outsourcing are absent. May the intra-group relationship be taken into account when applying the requirements on selecting and monitoring the service provider?
section: C. Outsourcing within a group or conglomerate

question: Under FINMA's outsourcing rules for banks, within what transition period must outsourcing relationships that already existed when the rules entered into force be adapted to the new requirements?

For managers of collective assets, FINMA's outsourcing circular applies to authorisations for changes from the time a change is submitted for approval, but no later than what period after its entry into force?
What must an outsourcing company and its service provider jointly draw up so that the outsourced function can continue to be performed in an emergency?
In conjunction with which business plan form do insurance companies keep their inventory of outsourced functions?
section: V. Requirements for outsourcing companies / A. Inventory of outsourced functions

question: A manager of collective assets wishes to delegate as many tasks as possible to third parties. Which task must it nevertheless perform itself for at least one collective investment scheme?
section: C. Managers of collective assets, fund management companies and

question: When applying the outsourcing requirements for banks, insurers and financial institutions, which four characteristics of the individual institution must be taken into account?
Which three parties must be granted an unrestricted contractual right to inspect and audit everything connected with an outsourced function?
